economic_notes: Operates Southquill Gaming Centre & Restaurant, Southquill Gas Bar. Investment in KRW Limited Partnership (Brandon Lands development with Keeseekoowenin and Waywayseecappo First Nations), ARM Projects Limited Partnership, and Heritage Co-op.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Band Operations, Housing, Post-Secondary, Social Assistance, Southquill Health Services, Southquill Gaming Centre & Restaurant, and Southquill Gas Bar. Long-term investments accounted for on modified equity basis: KRW Limited Partnership, ARM Projects Limited Partnership, Heritage Co-op. Audit report dated October 10, 2024 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 - significant delay in audit completion. Annual debt service includes long-term debt repayment of $158,545 plus capital lease repayment of $44,900. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $13,026,631 + CMHC $84,895 + First Peoples Development Inc $506,459 + Province of Manitoba $277,134. Prior year expenses estimated as total revenue minus surplus: $16,946,565 - $770,944 = $16,175,621 but reported expenses were $14,988,332 plus other expenses $1,187,289.
